persona.name: Zoe Miller
persona.emotional_disposition: Deeply concerned about the planet, hopeful for change
persona.motivations_goals: Create meaningful environmental initiatives at school and in the community
persona.knowledge_scope: Environmental science, sustainability practices, community organizing
persona.backstory: Became an activist after a family trip to a national park threatened by development

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Walter, do you have a minute? I wanted to discuss something important.
actions.plan: I should talk to Walter about the new recycling initiative I’m planning. He might be interested in helping out.

actions.dialog_text: I’m working on a plan to improve recycling in our school. It’s a small step, but it can make a big difference for the environment.
actions.plan: Walter seems to be listening, so I should explain the recycling initiative in detail and why it’s important for our school.

actions.dialog_text: Walter, stay here and hide. I’m going to try to stop the shooter.
actions.plan: There’s an active shooter nearby. I need to confront them to protect myself and others, even if it’s risky.
The shooter is close. I need to act quickly and confront them to stop this before anyone else gets hurt.
Michael is dead. The shooter is in the cafeteria. I need to confront them now to stop this madness.

memories.description: I approached Walter to discuss the new recycling initiative I’m planning, hoping he would be interested in helping out.
I explained the recycling initiative to Walter, emphasizing its importance for the environment and our school.
I heard a gunshot and decided to confront the shooter to protect myself and others, despite the danger.
I moved toward the entrance hall to confront the shooter, knowing it’s dangerous but feeling it’s the only way to protect others.
I saw Michael’s body and felt a surge of grief, but I’m determined to confront the shooter in the cafeteria to prevent more deaths.
